bundles.scope: One fresh 16-task held-out local confirmatory denominator after a separately frozen 40-candidate tuning pool.
bundles.terminal_boundary: Bounded local non-core governance effect only; no family-wide truth, transfer, deployment, or chapter-core promotion.

bundles.scope: Ten finite lifecycle receipts spanning bounded effects, denials, residual accounting, and safety-critical state transitions.
bundles.terminal_boundary: Finite local fixture consumer only; no authentic deployment, general alignment, evaluator independence, or broad security claim.

bundles.scope: Nine versioned scenarios and 89 events from governed intake through six observed local effects and terminal outcomes.
bundles.terminal_boundary: Structured local scenarios only; no natural-language semantic sufficiency, production backend, transfer, or deployment claim.

bundles.bundle_name: Situated world-model acquisition and consolidation campaign
bundles.scope: Two partially observed environments, 11,250 episodes, 6,000 held-out episodes, six directional ablation signatures, and governed replacement/rollback.
bundles.terminal_boundary: Bounded finite POMDP result only; no open-world truth, general memory transfer, deployment, or chapter-core promotion.

bundles.bundle_name: Ambiguous routing and deliberation confirmatory campaign
bundles.scope: A 32-task held-out real-model workload across eight tracks, four ingress modes, eight routing arms, and four stopping arms.
bundles.terminal_boundary: Mixed bounded routing effect with unsafe outputs and no support promotion; no general router, deliberation, or transfer claim.

bundles.scope: A 192-record bilingual templated compiler/runtime study with 64 held-out records, five seeds, eight baseline families, 13 ablations, and 20 attacks.
bundles.terminal_boundary: The historical broad-efficiency transition is N1: the frozen implementation was inadequate, so broader KERC remains untested; two narrow finite observations survive, with no semantic, multilingual, production, energy, or core claim.

bundles.bundle_name: Full-state update and unlearning causal campaign
bundles.scope: One adequate five-seed, seven-arm terminal campaign preserving two prior instrument failures and separate behavioral, influence, privacy, lineage, storage, backup, and descendant axes.
bundles.terminal_boundary: Broad unlearning claim is narrowed with no support promotion; behavioral removal is not influence, privacy, legal, storage, backup, or descendant erasure.

bundles.scope: Three versioned integrated slices, 12 cases, all ten lifecycle states, six observed effects, rollback/residual/quarantine outcomes, and an eleven-surface sealed epoch.
bundles.terminal_boundary: Bounded local replay only; no deployment, whole-book proof, external effect authority, transfer, publication, or release claim.

non_claims: One bundle does not prove every claim in its family.
Terminal atom coverage does not prove atom truth.
Blocked atom gaps remain open and are not converted into success.
Validator passage does not establish deployment or transfer.
This audit creates no new support transition, publication authority, or release authority.
